records.m_Talk_ENG: Kirk...?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Kirk...?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Kirk...?

records.m_Talk_ENG: No. What is that...?
records.m_Talk_DEU: No. What is that...?
records.m_Talk_FRA: No. What is that...?

records.m_Talk_ENG: I'm sorry. I told him to aim for your legs so you couldn't escape while trying to find you.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I'm sorry. I told him to aim for your legs so you couldn't escape while trying to find you.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I'm sorry. I told him to aim for your legs so you couldn't escape while trying to find you.

records.m_Talk_ENG: But Kirk's eyes were crushed by the fall, so he can't see a thing.
records.m_Talk_DEU: But Kirk's eyes were crushed by the fall, so he can't see a thing.
records.m_Talk_FRA: But Kirk's eyes were crushed by the fall, so he can't see a thing.

records.m_Talk_ENG: That's...
records.m_Talk_DEU: That's...
records.m_Talk_FRA: That's...

records.m_Talk_ENG: a blurry... and scary heart...
records.m_Talk_DEU: a blurry... and scary heart...
records.m_Talk_FRA: a blurry... and scary heart...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Yanikka...?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Yanikka...?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Yanikka...?

records.m_Talk_ENG: This damned Corruption Syndrome... Am I seeing another hallucination?
records.m_Talk_DEU: This damned Corruption Syndrome... Am I seeing another hallucination?
records.m_Talk_FRA: This damned Corruption Syndrome... Am I seeing another hallucination?

records.m_Talk_ENG: It could be. But the pain won't be!
records.m_Talk_DEU: It could be. But the pain won't be!
records.m_Talk_FRA: It could be. But the pain won't be!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Yeah, I guess so. *Cough...!*
records.m_Talk_DEU: Yeah, I guess so. *Cough...!*
records.m_Talk_FRA: Yeah, I guess so. *Cough...!*

records.m_Talk_ENG: Were you all planning this from the start?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Were you all planning this from the start?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Were you all planning this from the start?

records.m_Talk_ENG: No, just me.
records.m_Talk_DEU: No, just me.
records.m_Talk_FRA: No, just me.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Kirk and the others were more like my emergency rations in case I lost too much blood.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Kirk and the others were more like my emergency rations in case I lost too much blood.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Kirk and the others were more like my emergency rations in case I lost too much blood.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Emergency rations...?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Emergency rations...?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Emergency rations...?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Sorry, it had to be this way.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Sorry, it had to be this way.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Sorry, it had to be this way.

records.m_Talk_ENG: But I was ordered to safely retrieve the research asset, so...
records.m_Talk_DEU: But I was ordered to safely retrieve the research asset, so...
records.m_Talk_FRA: But I was ordered to safely retrieve the research asset, so...

records.m_Talk_ENG: I was hoping that Shepherd would come out of hiding after feeling a bond with you, and it looks like I was right.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I was hoping that Shepherd would come out of hiding after feeling a bond with you, and it looks like I was right.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I was hoping that Shepherd would come out of hiding after feeling a bond with you, and it looks like I was right.

records.m_Talk_ENG: But I didn't expect you to complete her yourself.
records.m_Talk_DEU: But I didn't expect you to complete her yourself.
records.m_Talk_FRA: But I didn't expect you to complete her yourself.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Yanikka...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Yanikka...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Yanikka...

records.m_Talk_ENG: I won't ask... when you started to betray me.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I won't ask... when you started to betray me.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I won't ask... when you started to betray me.

records.m_Talk_ENG: But how are you unharmed after getting your head smashed into pieces?
records.m_Talk_DEU: But how are you unharmed after getting your head smashed into pieces?
records.m_Talk_FRA: But how are you unharmed after getting your head smashed into pieces?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Remember when I told you about my being experimented on by the Northern Union?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Remember when I told you about my being experimented on by the Northern Union?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Remember when I told you about my being experimented on by the Northern Union?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Just like Shepherd is the result of a synthetic experiment, there's something mixed in me too.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Just like Shepherd is the result of a synthetic experiment, there's something mixed in me too.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Just like Shepherd is the result of a synthetic experiment, there's something mixed in me too.

records.m_Talk_ENG: And being able to control those corpses also has something to do with it?
records.m_Talk_DEU: And being able to control those corpses also has something to do with it?
records.m_Talk_FRA: And being able to control those corpses also has something to do with it?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Yup, good work figuring that out.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Yup, good work figuring that out.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Yup, good work figuring that out.

records.m_Talk_ENG: After all that they did to you... you're still working for them?
records.m_Talk_DEU: After all that they did to you... you're still working for them?
records.m_Talk_FRA: After all that they did to you... you're still working for them?

records.m_Talk_ENG: You're losing a lot of blood, Spencer. You don't have to keep talking to buy time.
records.m_Talk_DEU: You're losing a lot of blood, Spencer. You don't have to keep talking to buy time.
records.m_Talk_FRA: You're losing a lot of blood, Spencer. You don't have to keep talking to buy time.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I'm not interested in stopping Shepherd from escaping. Rather, I think it's a good thing.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I'm not interested in stopping Shepherd from escaping. Rather, I think it's a good thing.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I'm not interested in stopping Shepherd from escaping. Rather, I think it's a good thing.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Because after she goes back to the Normalside, all we have to do is find her again.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Because after she goes back to the Normalside, all we have to do is find her again.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Because after she goes back to the Normalside, all we have to do is find her again.

records.m_Talk_ENG: You... can't...
records.m_Talk_DEU: You... can't...
records.m_Talk_FRA: You... can't...

records.m_Talk_ENG: You don't... own her.
records.m_Talk_DEU: You don't... own her.
records.m_Talk_FRA: You don't... own her.

records.m_Talk_ENG: But, that fully prosthetic machine that doesn't even have a heart in her body isn't your child either.
records.m_Talk_DEU: But, that fully prosthetic machine that doesn't even have a heart in her body isn't your child either.
records.m_Talk_FRA: But, that fully prosthetic machine that doesn't even have a heart in her body isn't your child either.

records.m_Talk_ENG: The prosthetics that make up Shepherd are all owned by the Northern Union.
records.m_Talk_DEU: The prosthetics that make up Shepherd are all owned by the Northern Union.
records.m_Talk_FRA: The prosthetics that make up Shepherd are all owned by the Northern Union.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Looking at it medically or even philosophically, you don't get to claim ownership in any way.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Looking at it medically or even philosophically, you don't get to claim ownership in any way.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Looking at it medically or even philosophically, you don't get to claim ownership in any way.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Don't treat... that child like some property...!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Don't treat... that child like some property...!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Don't treat... that child like some property...!

records.m_Talk_ENG: *Sigh* I can't believe I have to decline the desperation of a mother who believes that this artificial body is her child. How much more of a lowlife can I be?
records.m_Talk_DEU: *Sigh* I can't believe I have to decline the desperation of a mother who believes that this artificial body is her child. How much more of a lowlife can I be?
records.m_Talk_FRA: *Sigh* I can't believe I have to decline the desperation of a mother who believes that this artificial body is her child. How much more of a lowlife can I be?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Well, the least I can do is send you off in peace with my own hands rather than letting you die from the explosion...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Well, the least I can do is send you off in peace with my own hands rather than letting you die from the explosion...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Well, the least I can do is send you off in peace with my own hands rather than letting you die from the explosion...

records.m_Talk_ENG: That much I can do for you, no?
records.m_Talk_DEU: That much I can do for you, no?
records.m_Talk_FRA: That much I can do for you, no?

records.m_Talk_ENG: No.
records.m_Talk_DEU: No.
records.m_Talk_FRA: No.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Don't.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Don't.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Don't.

records.m_Talk_ENG: We can't go together. And I don't want you to get caught up in it.
records.m_Talk_DEU: We can't go together. And I don't want you to get caught up in it.
records.m_Talk_FRA: We can't go together. And I don't want you to get caught up in it.

records.m_Talk_ENG: You understand, right? Because you can see what I'm feeling.
records.m_Talk_DEU: You understand, right? Because you can see what I'm feeling.
records.m_Talk_FRA: You understand, right? Because you can see what I'm feeling.

records.m_Talk_ENG: This is an order from your commander.
records.m_Talk_DEU: This is an order from your commander.
records.m_Talk_FRA: This is an order from your commander.

records.m_Talk_ENG: This miserable place... must not be all that you remember.
records.m_Talk_DEU: This miserable place... must not be all that you remember.
records.m_Talk_FRA: This miserable place... must not be all that you remember.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Please... Don't let me hold you back anymore.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Please... Don't let me hold you back anymore.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Please... Don't let me hold you back anymore.

records.m_Talk_ENG: No more.
records.m_Talk_DEU: No more.
records.m_Talk_FRA: No more.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Shepherd doesn't want to go alone.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Shepherd doesn't want to go alone.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Shepherd doesn't want to go alone.

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...Help.
records.m_Talk_DEU: ...Help.
records.m_Talk_FRA: ...Help.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Welp.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Welp.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Welp.

records.m_Talk_FRA: Kirk's now flat as a pancake.

records.m_Talk_DEU: That monster...
records.m_Talk_FRA: That monster...

records.m_Talk_ENG: I thought it already left.

root.m_Talk_FRA: But, that fully prosthetic machine that doesn't even have a heart in her body isn't your child either.

root.m_Talk_ENG: The prosthetics that make up Shepherd are all owned by the Northern Union.
root.m_Talk_DEU: The prosthetics that make up Shepherd are all owned by the Northern Union.
root.m_Talk_FRA: The prosthetics that make up Shepherd are all owned by the Northern Union.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Looking at it medically or even philosophically, you don't get to claim ownership in any way.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Looking at it medically or even philosophically, you don't get to claim ownership in any way.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Looking at it medically or even philosophically, you don't get to claim ownership in any way.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Don't treat... that child like some property...!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Don't treat... that child like some property...!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Don't treat... that child like some property...!

root.m_Talk_ENG: *Sigh* I can't believe I have to decline the desperation of a mother who believes that this artificial body is her child. How much more of a lowlife can I be?
root.m_Talk_DEU: *Sigh* I can't believe I have to decline the desperation of a mother who believes that this artificial body is her child. How much more of a lowlife can I be?
root.m_Talk_FRA: *Sigh* I can't believe I have to decline the desperation of a mother who believes that this artificial body is her child. How much more of a lowlife can I be?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Well, the least I can do is send you off in peace with my own hands rather than letting you die from the explosion...
root.m_Talk_DEU: Well, the least I can do is send you off in peace with my own hands rather than letting you die from the explosion...
root.m_Talk_FRA: Well, the least I can do is send you off in peace with my own hands rather than letting you die from the explosion...

root.m_Talk_ENG: That much I can do for you, no?
root.m_Talk_DEU: That much I can do for you, no?
root.m_Talk_FRA: That much I can do for you, no?

root.m_Talk_ENG: No.
root.m_Talk_DEU: No.
root.m_Talk_FRA: No.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Don't.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Don't.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Don't.

root.m_Talk_ENG: We can't go together. And I don't want you to get caught up in it.
root.m_Talk_DEU: We can't go together. And I don't want you to get caught up in it.
root.m_Talk_FRA: We can't go together. And I don't want you to get caught up in it.

root.m_Talk_ENG: You understand, right? Because you can see what I'm feeling.
root.m_Talk_DEU: You understand, right? Because you can see what I'm feeling.
root.m_Talk_FRA: You understand, right? Because you can see what I'm feeling.

root.m_Talk_ENG: This is an order from your commander.
root.m_Talk_DEU: This is an order from your commander.
root.m_Talk_FRA: This is an order from your commander.

root.m_Talk_ENG: This miserable place... must not be all that you remember.
root.m_Talk_DEU: This miserable place... must not be all that you remember.
root.m_Talk_FRA: This miserable place... must not be all that you remember.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Please... Don't let me hold you back anymore.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Please... Don't let me hold you back anymore.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Please... Don't let me hold you back anymore.

root.m_Talk_ENG: No more.
root.m_Talk_DEU: No more.
root.m_Talk_FRA: No more.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Shepherd doesn't want to go alone.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Shepherd doesn't want to go alone.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Shepherd doesn't want to go alone.

root.m_Talk_ENG: ...Help.
root.m_Talk_DEU: ...Help.
root.m_Talk_FRA: ...Help.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Welp.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Welp.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Welp.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Kirk's now flat as a pancake.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Kirk's now flat as a pancake.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Kirk's now flat as a pancake.

root.m_Talk_ENG: That monster...
root.m_Talk_DEU: That monster...
root.m_Talk_FRA: That monster...

root.m_Talk_ENG: I thought it already left.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I thought it already left.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I thought it already left.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Lurcher...?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Lurcher...?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Lurcher...?
